chapter_title.ar: باب الْمَنِيِّ وَ الْمَذْيِ يُصِيبَانِ الثَّوْبَ وَ الْجَسَدَ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 35 – The semen and the seminal fluid both hit the clothes and the body

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/155)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/155)
text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) آمُرُ الْجَارِيَةَ فَتَغْسِلُ ثَوْبِي مِنَ الْمَنِيِّ فَلَا تُبَالِغُ غَسْلَهُ فَأُصَلِّي فِيهِ فَإِذَا هُوَ يَابِسٌ قَالَ أَعِدْ صَلَاتَكَ أَمَّا إِنَّكَ لَوْ كُنْتَ غَسَلْتَ أَنْتَ لَمْ يَكُنْ عَلَيْكَ شَيْ‏ءٌ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from IBn Abu Umeyr, from Muawiya Bin Ammar, from Muyassar who said,

I said to Abu Abdullahasws, ‘I ordered my slave girl so she washed my clothes from the semen but its washing is not properly done, can I pray Salaat in it and it is dry?’ Heasws said: ‘Repeat your Salaat. As for you, had you washed it yourself, there would not have been anything upon you’.
en.sarwar: 2. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘Um ay r from Mu‘awiyah ibn ‘Ammar from Muyassir who has said the following: “I once said to abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, ‘I instruct the slave-girl to wash my clothes because of semen, but she does not pay proper attention to washing and I perform Salah (prayer) in them and it (semen) is dry. He (the Imam) said, ‘You must do your Salah (prayer) again. Had you yourself washed it, you would not have been required to perform your Salah (prayer) again.’”
